theme: Quality program bootstrap, safe instant chat fallback, and sidebar split

findings.expected: A harmless short prompt gets a fast local fallback when the selected provider is unavailable.
findings.actual: Before this cycle the route returned generic provider-failed copy.

findings.expected: Primary business navigation is visually and structurally separated from operations/settings navigation.
findings.actual: Before this cycle the renderer produced one flat nav stream and relied on weak sibling styling.
findings.evidence: Headless Edge desktop smoke showed two side-nav groups and bottom utility group 15px from sidebar bottom.
findings.regressionTest: npm run test:customization-ui plus Headless Edge sidebar smoke

findings.routeOrComponent: organization switch and tenant data stores
findings.expected: Non-owner users cannot see another org's CRM/proposals/memory/assets.
findings.actual: Owner harness proved document separation, not DB-auth non-member denial in browser.
findings.evidence: first real run report tenant separation section

findings.expected: No overlap, clipping, horizontal scroll, or unusable controls at supported mobile widths.
findings.actual: Full mobile viewport pass has not been run; Cycle 1 only proved 375px shell sanity.
findings.evidence: user screenshots, report caveat, and limited 375px shell smoke

commands.result: pass; no 254 refs under app shell

nextCycle: DB-auth org isolation browser proof; if local database-auth fixtures cannot be created, formalize and run the responsive viewport harness.
